title: LootBag Patches
body:
# LootBags Patched ### **Legal Disclaimer** If you are the original mod developer and you have an issue with this project, please message me on Discord at `furtabs`. I am trying to provide a fix for dead or discontinued versions of mods and do not intend to harm any mod author or gain monetary value from their work. ## **1.12.2**

Overview

A patched version of LootBags for Minecraft 1.12.2.

This project is a modified build of LootBags released under the mod's custom license, which permits changes when the original developer is unavailable. I have informed Malorolam about this patch and will remove it if requested.

Fixes

This patched version fixes issues: #178, #185, #188, #191, #215, #218.

  • Add ru_ru.lang (commit e3ee244)
  • Fix storage issues (#209)
  • Fix potential null pointer (#89)
  • Update tr_TR.lang (#154)

License Note

1a: If a modified version of the code is to be used to update the mod in my absence, whether perceived or actual, regardless of whether the work is done independently or at the request of a pack developer, inform me of the action.

  ## **1.20.1+** ### **Overview** This version of **LootBags** is a from-scratch rewrite built specifically for Minecraft 1.21.1. While it retains the core mechanics and gameplay loop of the original mod created by Malorolam, the code has been entirely reimagined to align with modern modding standards, data-driven systems, and performance optimizations. ### **License** Unlike the legacy versions, the 1.20.1 rewrite is licensed under the **MIT License**. This ensures the mod remains open-source, easily maintainable, and accessible for the community to build upon. ### **Features** LootBags adds various bags to mob drop tables that, when opened, provide items from vanilla and modded loot tables. \* **Dynamic Looting:** Bags drop from mobs based on configurable loot tables. \* **Loot Recycler**: A utility block that consumes unwanted items to generate new loot bags once a value threshold is reached. \* **Bag Opener**: A block designed for automation that opens bags and outputs the contents into pipes or chests. \* **Bag Storage**: A specialized inventory for managing, storing, and converting between different tiers of bags. \* **Data-Driven:** Fully utilizes modern Minecraft's JSON-based loot table system for easy customization by modpack creators. ### **Credits & Acknowledgments** The original concept, design, and mechanics of LootBags were created by \*\*Malorolam\*\*. This project is a tribute to that work, intended to keep the mod's legacy alive in the newest versions of Minecraft.  If you are the original developer and have any concerns regarding this rewrite, please contact me on Discord at \`furtabs\`. ### **Modpacks** You are free to include this mod in any modpack. No specific permission is required, though credit to the original author (Malorolam) and a link to this page is appreciated. ### **Support **If you encounter bugs or have feature requests for this version, please submit them via the project's GitHub Issue Tracker. I've been using BisectHosting for all my server hosting needs, and I couldn't be happier. New customers can get 25% off their first month with furtabs, and their support team is always available to provide excellent assistance.
